Transaction Hash not found on Base

0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef

View on Blockscan
BaseScan only provides an overview of the current state of the Base blockchain, we do not have control over transactions
  1. Check if the transaction was done on Base. If not, view the transaction on Blockscan.
  2. If you have just submitted a transaction please wait for at least 30 seconds before refreshing this page.
  3. It could still be in the TX Pool of a different node, waiting to be broadcasted.
  4. When the network is busy it can take a while for your transaction to propagate through the network and for us to index it.
  5. If it still does not show up after 1 hour, please check with your sender/exchange/wallet/transaction provider for additional information.

                A transaction is a cryptographically signed instruction that changes the blockchain state. Block explorers track the details of all transactions in the network. Learn more about transactions in our Knowledge Base.

                

            


        


        



    


    



    




    


    


        


            


                


                    

                    


                        


                    


                


            


        


    




    

    



    

    

    


        


            


                


                    

                


                


                    


                        


                            


                                

                            




                            
Before You Copy


                        




                        


                            


                        




                        




                        


                            

                            

                        


                    


                    


                        

                    


                


            


        


    


    



        

 


     


         


         


             
Transaction Private Note


             

         




         


             


             


                 

                 

             




             


                 



                 

                 




                 


                 
Please DO NOT store any passwords or private keys here. A private note (up to 100 characters) can be saved and is useful for transaction tracking.

                 


             




             


                 

                 View All Transactions Private Notes 

                 

             




             


         




         


             

             

             

         


         


     


 


 





 


     


         


             


                 


                     My Address - Private Name Tag or Note

                 


                 

             


             


                 


                     
My Name Tag:


                     

                     

                     
Private Name Tags (up to 35 characters) can be used for easy identification of addresses


                 


                 


                     
Private Note:


                                                         

                     
A private note (up to 500 characters) can be attached to this address. Please DO NOT store any passwords or private keys here.


                 


                 

                     View all Private Name Tags
